facebook.content:
In every season of life, God is working to reveal our character. Just as a refining fire burnishes gold to its truest form, God is at work in our lives to remove the dross and reveal our inner beauty.

This process is not always comfortable, but it's necessary for His glory to be revealed through us. As the Bible says, "Beloved, now are we the sons of God..." (1 John 3:2). We are already children of the King, but it's our character that often needs refinement.

instagram.content:
Authority in Relationships

Are you struggling to assert yourself in relationships?
God gives us the power to "rule with love" over those around us, not be ruled by them.

"Rule your house...and don't be controlled by your desires; but live in harmony with your wife, giving honor to her as to someone more important than yourself." 
(1 Peter 3:7, MSG)

tiktok.content: You think you're in charge, but are you really? In marriage, God ordains one head: the husband. "Wives, submit to your husbands as to the Lord" - Ephesians 5:22. But what does it mean to truly submit? Not to be controlled, but to be empowered by a shared vision of Christ's lordship over your home.
